objective: Choose whether Sybil should support whole-bundle cancellation, whole-bundle replacement, both, or neither by measuring stale loss, fill rate, delay, trader surplus, and shared-budget behavior together.

implementation.accounting: integer nanos and protocol quantity units; floating point is analysis-only

freeze_assertions: The immutable implementation revision was pushed before this protocol was created.
No seed in run_seeds had been executed or inspected when this protocol was created.
Development used only seeds 20000 through 20031 and a bounded smoke used seed 20000.
The earlier issue #198 held-out study consumed only seeds 10000 through 10127.
Every engine row, including failures, zero fills, and undefined conditional metrics, remains in the evidence denominator.

candidate_semantics.rule: Acknowledged deferred bundles remain eligible for their first batch even when a maker reaction reaches the venue before cutoff.
A cancel processed by the sequencer actor strictly before it dequeues the block tick removes the entire bundle; no quote survives and an IOC trader is not carried.
A valid replacement processed strictly before the block tick swaps every quote and the one shared budget atomically; a rejected replacement leaves the old bundle unchanged.

timing_contract.cutoff: The sequencer actor's dequeue of the block-production message, not client wall-clock observation.
timing_contract.same_timestamp_priority: The block tick wins; the benchmark therefore requires maker_action_arrival_ms < cutoff_ms.
timing_contract.after_cutoff: Cancel and replace are too late for the in-flight clone and cannot rewrite that batch.
timing_contract.next_batch: A normal fresh MM submission is available; natural GTD flow may wait, while informed IOC flow does not.

paired_input_contract: same shocked markets and trader intents
same maker and taker venue arrival times
same ordered multi-market quote bundle and one shared integer MM budget
same production retained-cash solver and integer verifier
mechanism-specific cancellation effects are explicit outputs rather than silently equalized

episode_families.purpose: Measure whole-bundle cancel and replacement at the actor cutoff across small and broad shared-budget bundles.

axis_selection_provenance.rule: Retain decision boundaries while removing diagnostic interpolation axes.
retained_boundaries: two-market and eight-market bundles, with either two shocked markets or the entire broad bundle shocked
maker actions clearly before cutoff, near the 500 ms cutoff, after the 500 ms cutoff, and after the 10 second cutoff
25% constrained and 100% unconstrained shared MM budgets

run_seeds.selection: First 64 seeds of the untouched embargo declared by the development protocol, frozen before execution.
run_seeds.reuse: Never reuse these consumed seeds for confirmatory evidence after the first complete run.

materiality.decision_rule: Call a configuration-level difference material only when the paired point estimate exceeds the declared threshold and its 95% interval excludes zero. Report maker, trader, fill, coverage, and delay effects separately.

failure_policy.conditional_metrics: Leave a conditional metric undefined when either engine has no defined value; always report defined and undefined pair counts.

interpretation_limits: The benchmark isolates declared mechanism effects; it is not a calibrated production effect size.
A lower stale-loss result does not establish a free improvement when fill rate, trader surplus, coverage, or delay worsens.
The economic result does not by itself authorize a wire, persistence, signature, or validity migration.
Actor mailbox order, not client timestamps, is the production cutoff authority.
